Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS
AMEND (T) AND RECOMMIT TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Establishes how the MTA shall operate the time-delay egress mechanisms
Summary: Establishes how the MTA shall operate the time-delay egress mechanisms and when such time-delay egress mechanisms may be used.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to expanding time-delay mechanisms on emergency exit gates
